task_completion.description: Agent searches for the term 'monitor' in the ReqView application
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ReqView application is visible with the search bar active, and the word 'monitor' is typed into the search field, ideally showing 0 results.

task_completion.description: Agent creates or opens the monitoring_report.txt file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., gedit, nano, vim) or terminal window is visible, showing the creation or editing of a file named 'monitoring_report.txt' in the '/home/ga/Documents/ReqView/' directory.

task_completion.description: The report contains the correct Search Term line
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file being edited contains the exact line 'Search Term: monitor'.

task_completion.description: The report contains the correct Total Matches line based on the ground truth
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file being edited contains the exact line 'Total Matches: 0'.

task_completion.description: The report contains the Matching Requirements header with no entries
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains the line 'Matching Requirements:' and there are no requirement IDs or descriptions listed below it.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the ReqView GUI to find the information
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent actively using the ReqView application interface to search, rather than bypassing the GUI by using terminal commands (like grep or jq) on the underlying project files.

integrity.description: Agent did not invent fake requirements
integrity.visual_evidence: The report must not contain any fabricated requirement IDs or descriptions. The section under 'Matching Requirements:' must be empty.

integrity.description: Agent saved the file to the exact requested path
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor's title bar, save dialog, or terminal command explicitly shows the file path as '/home/ga/Documents/ReqView/monitoring_report.txt'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target document is the 'SRS'. The search term is 'monitor'. An exhaustive search of the SRS document confirms that the term 'monitor' does NOT exist anywhere within it (0 occurrences). Therefore, a correct agent execution will report 'Total Matches: 0' and list no requirement IDs under the 'Matching Requirements:' section.
